calendar.matters:
Petition For Order That Real Property Located At 139 Madrid Street, San Francisco And Held In Decedents Name Constitutes A Trust Asset
Off Calendar Sep-23-2013 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order That Real Property Located At 139 Madrid Street, San Francisco And Held In Decedents Name Constitutes A Trust Asset
Off Calendar Sep-09-2013 Continued To Sep-23-13 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kevin Lachona for Lawrence Medina (Petitioner). Franchesca Callejo for and with Cesar Ragazzone (Surviving Spouse). Rosa Gallardo in pro per.

Mr. Lachona reported that the 850 Petition is resolved after mediation, that they are prepared to sign the agreement. Ms. Callejo reported that she will exchange information with Ms. Gallardo. Ms. Gallardo stated her concern with the delay in getting the agreement, and that the party may lose the loan commitment. The matter was continued to September 23, 2013 at 11:00 a.m. (to accommodate Ms. Callejo's schedule), in Dept. 204. If all the parties have signed the agreement and submitted, no appearance will be required.

udge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order That Real Property Located At 139 Madrid Street, San Francisco And Held In Decedents Name Constitutes A Trust Asset
Off Calendar Jul-01-2013 Continued To Sep-09-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sheila Robello for Lawrence Medina. Franchesca Callejo for and with Cesar Raggazonne (Spouse). Lily Moallem for Rosa Gallardo.

The Petition for Order That Real Property Located at 139 Madrid Street, San Francisco and Held In Decedent's Name Constitutes a Trust Asset was continued to September 9, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on settlement talks and status on discovery. The Parties agree that further mediation will not be useful and will continue to meet and confer.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Bradley.

Petition For Order That Real Property Located At 139 Madrid Street, San Francisco And Held In Decedents Name Constitutes A Trust Asset
Off Calendar Mar-04-2013 Continued To Jul-01-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sheila Robello for Lawrence Medina. Peter Meyers and Lily Moallen for and with Rosa Gallardo (Objector). Franchesca Callejo for Decedent's Spouse.

The Court asks the parties if they are willing to meet for mediation. Ms. Moallen informs the Court that the topic of mediation has not been discussed. Ms. Robello states that her client is not local and would need to check if he is opposed to that suggestion. Ms. Robello requests and evidentary hearing and Ms. Moallen does not believe that this is an evidentary issue. The Court sends both parties to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed not later than June 19, 2013. counsel must notify the probate examiner on the status of mediation by June 24, 2013. The matter was continued to July 1, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Ella Yip/ Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
